selfAssessment.achievements: Successfully completed the ERP migration project ahead of schedule. Reduced monthly report preparation time by 40% through automation scripts. Contributed to the budget planning process and maintained 100% accuracy.
selfAssessment.challenges: Managing workload during the peak audit season was challenging. Needed to improve delegation skills.
selfAssessment.improvements: I plan to improve my presentation skills and take on more leadership responsibilities in Q1.

managerAssessment.strengths: Sara consistently delivers high-quality work. She shows great analytical skills and attention to detail. Her contribution to the ERP migration was commendable.
managerAssessment.areasForImprovement: Should work on communication with cross-functional teams and improve time management during high-pressure periods.
managerAssessment.recommendation: Ready for senior analyst promotion consideration in H2 2026.

selfAssessment.achievements: Resolved 98% of IT tickets within SLA. Set up the new network monitoring system. Helped onboard 3 new employees with IT setup.
selfAssessment.challenges: Documentation of IT processes needs improvement. Sometimes overwhelmed with ticket volume.
selfAssessment.improvements: Want to build a comprehensive knowledge base and improve ticket resolution speed.

managerAssessment.strengths: Omar is reliable and technically competent. He goes the extra mile to resolve issues quickly. Good attitude and team player.
managerAssessment.areasForImprovement: Needs to improve documentation habits and proactive communication with users on ticket status.
managerAssessment.recommendation: Continue in current role with focus on process documentation and knowledge sharing.
